case_title: TRAN, DUNG QUOC VS UNITED STATES POSTAL SERVICE STAMPS BY MAIL et al

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED STATES POSTAL SERVICE    STAMPS BY MAIL THE MATTER BELONGS IN FEDERAL COURT SINCE THE U.S. POSTAL SERVICE IS THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR FEE WAIVER GRANTED. COURT ORDER FILED.COPY SENT TO APPLICANT.
